item.title: We Need a Vote on Iran
item.description: A decision as consequential as this one deserves a real debate in Congress.

item.title: An ‘Acceptable War’
item.description: Why does the MAGA base now seem to approve of an approach to war they supposedly sought to reject?

item.title: Would You Believe That Democrats Were Not Anti-Israel Enough in 2024?
item.description: Even left-of-center analysts have thrown cold water on the far left’s self-flattering narratives.

item.title: The Supreme Court Makes a Prudent Ruling on the Trump Tariffs
item.description: The Court’s decision aligns with the Framers’ views of presidential authority.

item.title: States Should Put Workers First with Private Sector Labor Reforms
item.description: It’s no accident that right-to-work states have the highest net domestic population growth.
